Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Riverbend Music Center
Cincinnati, OH
Seating Capacity: 20500
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 26
  DMB  (26)

Longest Performance:
08.01.06 - Seek Up (20:59)

Song Liberations
  6.24.03 – I'll Back You Up (after 1014 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Riverbend Music Center opened on July 4, 1984 with a performance by Erich Kunzel and the Cincinnati Pops and is surrounded by Coney Island Park and the Ohio River.

6295 Kellogg Ave.
Cincinnati, OH 45230

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
Grace Is Gone (6.27.00)
